name: watch
description: Fork of Brad Bonanno's bradautomates/claude-video. Adds opt-in question-aware evidence retrieval; an initial one-video, three-question benchmark used 60-79% fewer estimated reader tokens and tied or won blind paired judging. Broader testing is in progress.

interface.shortDescription: Give the agent a video input — ask a question, get only the evidence that answers it.
interface.longDescription: watch is a fork of Brad Bonanno's original bradautomates/claude-video. It downloads video with yt-dlp, extracts frames with ffmpeg, obtains a timestamped transcript from native captions or optional Whisper, and gives the evidence to the model. This fork adds opt-in question-aware retrieval: chapters, pricing/benchmark lines, cue moments, and on-screen tables. In an initial one-video, three-question benchmark it used 60-79% fewer estimated reader tokens and tied or won blind paired judging; broader testing is in progress. Failures use an automatic compatibility fallback.
defaultPrompt: /watch https://youtu.be/<launch-video> what's actually new — skip the hype?
